allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add .gitignore for worktrees and common files

- Add .worktrees/ to prevent tracking worktree contents
- Add standard ignores for Node.js, build output, IDE, and OS files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Convert to Expo module - Android complete

Phase 1-3 Complete: Expo Module Configuration + Android Native

Changes:
- Add expo-module.config.json for Expo module definition
- Create app.plugin.js config plugin for automatic setup
  - Auto-configures Android permissions and manifest
  - Auto-configures iOS entitlements and Info.plist
- Update package.json with Expo peerDependencies
- Convert UltimateAlarmModule.kt to use Expo Modules API
  - Cleaner Kotlin DSL syntax
  - No more React Native bridge boilerplate
  - Uses Expo''s AsyncFunction and Events
- Update AlarmStorage.kt to work with Map instead of ReadableMap
- Update android/build.gradle to use expo-modules-core
- Remove React Native bridge dependencies

Benefits:
✅ Automatic native configuration via config plugin
✅ Cleaner, more maintainable code
✅ Better TypeScript integration
✅ Works with Expo autolinking

Next: Convert iOS native module to Expo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
